project.name: AIRP Engine Console
project.designRead: developer console / RP engine testers / warm Anthropic light / medium density / clean professional
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Claude Code inspired light mode — warm clay/amber accent (#C4653A) on cream-white surfaces, clean JetBrains Mono + Inter, subtle warm borders, developer tool feel.

styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: primary: #C4653A (warm clay/amber), bg: #FAFAF8 → #FFFFFF surface stack, text: #1A1A1E → #9E9890
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: white cards on cream base, 1px border separators, no shadows on static elements
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: clean white card panels, warm border separators, monospace for code/data, sans-serif for UI
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: minimal icons, status-dot indicators, no decorative images
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: subtle hover feedback only, no animations

sharedProjectShellContract.navigation: top bar with AIRP logo + engine URL + connection status + settings gear
sharedProjectShellContract.layout: left sidebar (300px) + center content + right event log (collapsible)
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceModel: bg-base #FAFAF8 → bg-surface #FFFFFF cards → bg-input #FFFFFF, border-default #E0DCD8 separators
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryAction: solid bg-primary buttons, border-default secondary buttons
sharedProjectShellContract.typography: Inter for labels, JetBrains Mono for data/code/event-log
sharedProjectShellContract.mode: light-first (no class on html, dark via .dark class)

pages.title: 角色列表
pages.visualNorthStar: Clean light Claude Code — warm cream surface, character cards with avatar placeholders, prominent LLM config panel
pages.compositionPattern: left sidebar config + center character grid + right collapsible event log

pages.title: 对话空间
pages.visualNorthStar: Roleplay workspace — character context header, session list in sidebar, chat area with streaming cursor
pages.compositionPattern: sidebar (character info + session list) + center chat + right event log

pages.title: 工作台
pages.visualNorthStar: Focused editing surface — tabbed card/lorebook editor with clean form hierarchy and live status
pages.compositionPattern: overlay panel with tabbed editing surface, clean form layout
